hero_headline: Hey, I'm the person behind Cookie Digital.
hero_sub: Just one developer, based in the NY tri-state area, who genuinely enjoys building things that help small businesses succeed online.
story_p1: Hey, I’m Cookie Digital I build websites for local businesses and people who want a clean, modern online presence without spending thousands on an agency.
story_p2: I started learning web design because I’ve always been into tech and creating things, and over time it turned into something I genuinely enjoy doing. Right now I run everything myself, from designing the site to making sure it actually works well and looks professional on phones and computers.
story_p3:
Since I work independently, I try to keep the process simple, personal, and affordable. I focus on making websites that look good, load fast, and help businesses stand out online. 

I'm always learning new things and improving my work with every project, and I care a lot about making sure people are happy with the final result.
location_text: I'm based in the NY tri-state area and primarily work with businesses in New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut. That said, I'm happy to work with anyone — location has never stopped a good project.
working_text: You'll always know what's going on. I'll respond quickly and won't leave you hanging. If something's going to take longer than expected, you'll hear from me before you have to ask.
